  focusing on the return type change for stop_chat_server and the
  narrowing of exception catches. I'll also review the updated
  call sites in ensure_chat_server, revive_archived_session, and
  kill_repo_session to ensure consistent error propagation and
  resilience. This will be followed by a review of the new tests
  in tests/test_hub_core.py.
